parameters.body:
=UPSERT rekam_medis_embedding SET
  context_text = {{ JSON.stringify($json.contextText) }},
  embedding = {{ JSON.stringify($json.contextEmbedding) }},
  raw_data = {{ JSON.stringify($json.rawData) }},
  updated_at = time::now()
WHERE id = 'latest_batch';
=SELECT *, vector::similarity::cosine(embedding, {{ JSON.stringify($json.queryEmbedding) }}) AS score FROM rekam_medis_embedding ORDER BY score DESC LIMIT 5;

_readme.description: Workflow DARSI AI Strategic Analyst menggunakan Gemini 2.0 Flash (LLM) dan text-embedding-004 (Embedding).
env_variables_required: GEMINI_API_KEY — API key dari Google AI Studio (aistudio.google.com)
SUPABASE_URL — URL project Supabase, contoh: https://xyz.supabase.co
SUPABASE_ANON_KEY — Anon key dari Supabase dashboard
surrealdb_setup_queries: DEFINE FIELD context_text ON TABLE rekam_medis_embedding TYPE string;
DEFINE FIELD embedding ON TABLE rekam_medis_embedding TYPE array<float>;
DEFINE FIELD raw_data ON TABLE rekam_medis_embedding TYPE array;
DEFINE FIELD updated_at ON TABLE rekam_medis_embedding TYPE datetime;
DEFINE INDEX idx_embedding ON TABLE rekam_medis_embedding FIELDS embedding MTREE DIMENSION 768 DIST COSINE;

body.query: Bagaimana kondisi BOR dan pendapatan rumah sakit minggu ini?
